zh.lifeSummary: 當John De Criol於大約1210年出生在英國英格蘭肯特普雷斯頓時，他的父親Bertram de Criol22歲，母親Emma de Sarre28歲。他和Matilda Eastwell至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1263年享年55歲。

zh-hans.Westwood,Preston,Lancashire,England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John De Criol于大约1210年出生在英国英格兰肯特普雷斯頓时，他的父亲Bertram de Criol22岁，母亲Emma de Sarre28岁。他和Matilda Eastwell至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于大约1263年享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Criol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German   Krill   or   Grill  . This surname is also found in the Channel Islands.
English and Scottish: metathesized form of   Curl  .

variants.name: Krill
meanings: nickname for a lively, cheerful person, from Low German krill ‘lively, healthy’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When John De Criol was born about 1210, in Preston, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Bertram de Criol, was 22 and his mother, Emma de Sarre, was 28. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Matilda Eastwell. He died about 1263, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John De Criol est né environ 1210, à Preston, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Bertram de Criol, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Emma de Sarre, avait 28 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Matilda Eastwell. Il est décédé environ 1263, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John De Criol um 1210 in Preston, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Bertram de Criol 22 und seine Mutter Emma de Sarre 28. Er hatte mit Matilda Eastwell mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1263 im Alter von 55 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John De Criol è nato il circa 1210 nel Preston, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Bertram de Criol, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Sarre, aveva 28 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Matilda Eastwell. Morì circa 1263, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John De Criolが約1210年にイギリスイギリスケントプレストンで生まれた時，父Bertram de Criolは22歳，母Emma de Sarreは28歳であった。彼はMatilda Eastwellとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1263年に55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John De Criol(이)가 대략 1210년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 플레스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Bertram de Criol(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Sarre(은)는 28세였다. 그는 Matilda Eastwell(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1263년 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John De Criol nasceu aproximadamente 1210, em Preston, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Bertram de Criol, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Sarre, tinha 28 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Matilda Eastwell. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1263, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John De Criol родился около 1210 г. в местности престон, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Bertram de Criol было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Emma de Sarre, 28. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Matilda Eastwell. Он умер около 1263 г. в возрасте 55 лет.
